prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

args.content: Lumina: Light that works in sync with your day.

Headline: Lumina keeps your desk in perfect focus all day long.

Paragraph 1: Remote work demands both mental clarity and physical comfort, so why let your lighting stay stuck in yesterday? Lumina is the smart desk lamp that reads your day and adapts automatically—warmer, softer glows that ease you into focus, cooler, brighter balance when meetings happen, and gentle dimming to unwind.

Paragraph 2: By syncing to your calendar, circadian cues, and the room around you, Lumina gives you illumination that matches the moment. No apps to babysit—just on-the-fly adjustments that make your workspace feel intentional and calm.

Paragraph 3: Designed for the modern work-from-anywhere professional, this premium lamp looks as serene as it feels. Plug in, pair once, and Lumina transparently does the rest so you can stay in the zone from first coffee to sunset.

Email 1
Subject: Meet Lumina, the lamp that understands your day
Body:
Hi there,

Remote work is a marathon of meetings, deep work blocks, and late-afternoon fatigue. Lumina is the smart desk lamp that keeps your lighting aligned with every moment—from calendar cues to natural light levels. It keeps your workspace in tune with your body and schedule, so you can focus without fiddling with controls.

Lumina is ready to ship for $149. Stay tuned—the glow up starts soon.

Lightly,
The Lumina Team

——

Email 2
Subject: How Lumina crafts focus for every part of your day
Body:
Hey,

Imagine a light that shifts as you move through your workday. Morning emails feel warmer, midday sessions turn brighter, and late-afternoon follows a gentle dusk. Lumina senses ambient light, reviews your calendar, and aligns its color temperature and brightness automatically.

It’s plug-and-play with Mac, PC, and smart home routines, plus it preserves your preferred scenes so your favorite glow is always seconds away. Remote work just got a smarter, softer upgrade.

Warm wishes,
The Lumina Team

——

Email 3
Subject: Last chance—launch pricing for Lumina ends soon
Body:
Hi,

Lumina is live and available for $149, but our launch pricing is slipping away soon. Whether you’re in a home office, studio, or temporary workspace, the lamp that constantly calibrates to your schedule and environment makes every hour feel intentional.

Claim yours today, and experience a light that keeps pace with how you work. Illuminate your focus before the clock runs out.

Ready to glow?
The Lumina Team

Twitter / X:
Post 1: Remote work is a full-time hustle—your lighting should be on your team. Lumina shifts with your calendar, ambient light, and circadian rhythm to keep you calm, focused, and sharp. Get the glow for $149. #RemoteWork #SmartDeskLight #Lumina
Post 2: Meetings, deep work, late-night edits… Lumina adjusts every time of day automatically. No knobs, no fuss—just the right light when you need it. Pre-order now and beam with purpose. #WFH #DeskSetup #LuminaLaunch

Instagram:
Post 1: [Image idea: Lumina casting warm light over laptop + coffee] Caption: Designed for remote work sequences, Lumina reads the room and your calendar to deliver the right light for the right moment. Wake up with warmth, stay energized through the afternoon, and ease into evening—all at the tap of a smart routine. $149. #RemoteWorkLife #SmartDeskDesign #Lumina
Post 2: [Image idea: before/after lighting comparison + product shot] Caption: Your desk is a command center. Your lighting should adapt with it. Lumina balances color temperature and brightness based on real-time cues, so you never feel out of sync with the day. Launching now. Link in bio. #DeskGoals #ProductivityHack #LuminaLight

LinkedIn:
Post 1: Your workspace deserves better lighting. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that adjusts automatically to your calendar, ambient light, and circadian rhythm so you stay focused without fiddling with controls. Built for remote teams seeking calm, efficient workdays. #RemoteWork #Productivity #LuminaLaunch
Post 2: From morning standups to deep-focus blocks, lighting plays a silent but mighty role in your performance. Lumina quietly keeps your desk in sync with the day, giving you the energy you need when you need it most. Discover the lamp built for modern professionals. #HybridWork #SmartLighting #Lumina

Hero
Headline: Light that adapts to your day, so you can stay in the zone.
Subheadline: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that reads your calendar, ambient light, and circadian rhythm to deliver the right temperature and brightness for every task.
CTA Button: Reserve yours today for $149.

Features
1. Calendar Syncing: Lumina knows when meetings, focus blocks, or breaks are coming and adjusts its glow automatically.
2. Circadian-Aware Lighting: Warm, gentle hues to start the day, energizing blues during peak focus, and mellow tones to wind down in the evening.
3. Ambient Light Sensor: The lamp senses natural light in your room and compensates instantly so you always work in balanced illumination.
4. Personal Presets & Smart Routines: Save your favorite scenes, create “creative mode” or “call-ready” setups, and link Lumina with your smart home or productivity tools.
5. Minimalist, Premium Design: Brushed aluminum, a soft-touch finish, and whisper-quiet performance make Lumina feel like a luxurious extension of your workspace.

Testimonials
[Placeholder for customer testimonials—quotes and names to be added once beta users respond.]

FAQ
Q1: How does Lumina know what lighting setting to use?
A1: Lumina syncs with your calendar and uses onboard sensors to measure ambient light. It blends those cues with circadian-based temperature shifts to deliver the best glow for each moment.

Q2: Do I need an app to control it?
A2: Lumina works out of the box with minimal setup. You can make adjustments via our companion app, but it functions autonomously once paired.

Q3: What devices does Lumina support?
A3: Lumina is platform agnostic—compatible with Mac, Windows, Chromebooks, and integrates with leading smart home ecosystems.

Q4: Is it easy to customize lighting scenes?
A4: Absolutely. Create and save scenes for different tasks and trigger them via voice command or scheduled routines.

Q5: How loud is Lumina?
A5: Lumina features whisper-soft electronics so it never becomes a distraction during meetings or focus time.

CTA
Bring mindful lighting to every remote workday. Order Lumina for $149 and let the light take care of your focus.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp for Remote Workers Who Need Lighting That Keeps Pace with Their Day

SAN FRANCISCO, Oct. 25, 2024 — Lumina, a new smart lighting brand for remote professionals, today launched its flagship desk lamp that automatically adapts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. Priced at $149, Lumina brings personalized, productivity-enhancing light to remote workers ages 25-40 who demand both calm and focus in their work-from-home environments.

“Remote work is constantly shifting,” said Priya Desai, founder and CEO of Lumina. “Your lighting should never be stuck in one mode while your schedule evolves. We built Lumina to anticipate those shifts, keep your workspace balanced, and remove the mental load of managing the glow.”

Lumina uses a built-in ambient light sensor along with calendar integration to intelligently adjust from warm, energizing early morning light to cooler, focus-enhancing tones during deep work blocks, returning to soothing dusk hues when the day winds down. It also includes customizable presets and smart home compatibility, letting users trigger scenes for video calls, creative bursts, or unwinding.

The lamp ships with a minimal, premium design, handcrafted materials, and whisper-quiet electronics so it feels like a considered addition to any modern workspace. Remote teams can deploy Lumina without extra apps—the lamp pairs quickly with major operating systems and syncs with productivity tools to keep schedules and light in lockstep.

Lumina is available beginning today at lumina-light.com for $149, with limited launch stock supporting free shipping across the continental United States.

About Lumina
Lumina builds intelligent lighting solutions for the modern workspace. With seamless automation and premium design, Lumina helps remote workers feel energized, focused, and comfortable no matter where they work from. Learn more at lumina-light.com.

steps.text:
All requested deliverables have been created with full marketing copy tailored for Lumina. Here’s what’s been generated:

- **tagline.txt**: Memorable brand tagline.
- **hero-copy.txt**: Landing page hero section with headline and paragraphs describing Lumina’s value.
- **email-sequence.txt**: Three launch emails (subject + body) covering introduction, feature highlights, and urgency.
- **social-posts.txt**: Multi-platform social media content (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) with at least two posts each.
- **landing-page.txt**: Complete landing page copy with hero, feature list, testimonial placeholder, FAQ (5 questions), and CTA.
- **press-release.txt**: Properly formatted press release announcing the launch.

Let me know if you’d like any refinements or additional assets (e.g., imagery guidance, tagline variations, or campaign timing).

artifacts.brand-guide.md:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features
